description:
Writ of agency (אביזאריה). Location: Tripoli (Syria). Dated: Monday, 9 Sivan 4839 = 13 May 1079. Between ʿUlla ha-Levi and Yeshuʿa "Pride of the Communities." Signed by Yehuda b. Natan ha-Kohen, Ḥalfon b. Aharon ha-Kohen, Ibrāhīm b. Ṣāliḥ, Naḥum b. Yannay, Mushafir b. Ṣedaqa, Shelomo b. Halfon, Shemuel b. Aharon. 

The qiyyum (validation) (completed in Fustat?) is signed by Shelomo b. Yiṣḥaq the descendant of Meʾir Gaʾon, Ṣāliḥ b. Yivhar he-Ḥaver, and Yaʿaqov b. Yosef. The name Yeter ha-Levi b. Shela also appears in the qiyyum, probably referring to a signature of the original document which is now missing. AA
description_he: שטר ייפוי כוח, טריפולי, 13 במאי 1079. בין עולא הלוי לבין ישועה 'פאר הקהילות'.
